notes.model_idle_pct: % of step observations where llm_running + llm_waiting == 0
notes.queue_stats: Mean running/waiting/kv_cache per model from step-level snapshots
notes.strategy_distribution: Exact step counts per strategy (InfraMind only)
notes.mas_grouping: Grouped by cost_rate, then by arrival_rate within each
notes.inframind_grouping: by_arrival_rate (across budgets), by_budget (across rates), by_budget_and_arrival_rate (full grid)
